description: Monte Carlo power for a design with no closed-form formula: simulate -> analyze with the planned model -> repeat, returning power plus a Wilson MC confidence interval.
rules: read-only: writes only a JSON result into RECORD_STORE
DESIGN selects one bundled worked example: two_group, logistic, cluster_randomized, linear_mixed
estimate is reproducible for a fixed SEED; report the returned MC CI so 0.81 vs 0.79 is read as signal or noise
use n_sims >= 1000 (5000-10000 near 80%) for a stable estimate
the bundled designs are the starting point to copy and adapt - swap in your own data-generating process for production use
usage: Set DESIGN (two_group | logistic | cluster_randomized | linear_mixed). Optional N (sample size, design-specific units), N_SIMS (default 1000), EFFECT, ALPHA, SEED. Output: simulate_power.json.
limitation: Stochastic - the result is a Monte Carlo estimate, not exact. cluster_randomized and linear_mixed fit statsmodels mixed models and are slow at large n/n_sims. The survival example from the source needs lifelines and is not exposed here.
